Wasl Group launches a unique artistic initiative titled “Museum of Light” to showcase creative and artistic works across the group’s assets. The first collaboration under the initiative was implemented with Emirati artist Mattar bin Lahej, featuring an artwork displayed on the façade of Wasl Tower inspired by a poem by His Highness Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum.
